pupilNumbers.note: Pupils in state-funded alternative provision in England (pupil referral units, AP academies, AP free schools)

ofstedRatings.note: Percentage of AP schools rated Inadequate or Requires Improvement by Ofsted

attainment.note: GCSE grade 9-4 in both English and Maths

metadata.methodology: AP pupil numbers from DfE January school census, state-funded AP settings only. Ofsted ratings from published inspection outcomes. Attainment figures from DfE KS4 performance tables, comparing pupils in AP settings with all mainstream school pupils.
knownIssues: AP pupil numbers exclude pupils in unregistered provision — true numbers likely higher
Ofsted rating comparison with mainstream schools partly reflects pupil complexity, not solely provision quality
2020 figures affected by COVID-19 school closures
